note: Side project demo data. Replace scripts/update-anime-data.js with a licensed ranking source for production.

items.title: Kaiju No. 8
items.summary: Kafka Hibino once dreamed of joining the Defense Force, but became a kaiju cleanup worker. After gaining the power to transform into a kaiju, he gets one more chance to chase that dream.

items.title: Demon Slayer: Hashira Training Arc
items.summary: Tanjiro and the Demon Slayer Corps prepare for the final battle through intense training led by the Hashira.

items.title: SPY x FAMILY
items.summary: A spy, an assassin, and a telepathic child form a fake family for a mission, while slowly becoming something much more real.

items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
items.summary: Yuji Itadori enters the world of jujutsu sorcerers after swallowing a cursed object, facing curses, conspiracies, and brutal choices.

items.title: Delicious in Dungeon
items.summary: Laios and his party dive into a dungeon to rescue his sister, surviving by cooking the monsters they encounter.

items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
items.summary: After defeating the Demon King, the long-lived elf mage Frieren travels again to understand memory, time, and human emotion.

items.title: Solo Leveling
items.summary: The weakest hunter, Sung Jinwoo, survives a deadly dungeon and receives a mysterious system that lets him level up alone.

items.title: Attack on Titan
items.summary: Humanity hides behind massive walls to survive the Titans, while Eren and his friends uncover the cruel truth of their world.

items.title: Haikyu!!
items.summary: Shoyo Hinata joins Karasuno High's volleyball team and fights toward the national stage with speed, instinct, and teamwork.

items.title: One Piece
items.summary: Monkey D. Luffy sails the Grand Line with the Straw Hat crew in search of the legendary treasure known as One Piece.
